sections.paragraph:
Original: מצביה

Transliteration: metsôbâyâh

Phonetic: mets-o-baw-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Mesobaite = "the one set up of JAH"
  1. of Jaasiel, one of David's mighty warriors
    1. form unsuitable for adjective

Origin: apparently from H4672 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name
